# ⚡ Developer Platform Integration Guide

This document provides a complete step-by-step guide for integrating with the Developer Platform, from registration and application creation to authentication, API access.  
Please follow each step carefully to ensure a smooth integration process.

---

## 1. Select Language

After entering the platform registration page, select your preferred language:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/d2c05c4c0abc482ea994c25c6723d8d4.png)

---

## 2. Select Region

Choose the region (Region) according to your deployment location:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/7177d9ec95ea4e219329f101cc20d7b1.png)

---

## 3. Register Developer Account

### 3.1 Open the Registration Page
Click **“Register”** in the top-right corner or use the registration entry on the homepage:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/50891fb5e6bf4bec9f02a7ce57cd72b7.png)

### 3.2 Create a Developer Account
Click **“Create Developer Account”**:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/0ae3931ef2d843709587ba6c30897148.png)

### 3.3 Register via Third-Party Platform
Enter the **Third-party Platform** page and click **“Register a Developer Account”**:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/44707d1f2a5b4b199f28b13a9e5ced53.png)

### 3.4 Fill in Account Information
Fields marked with * are required.  
Enter your email address and click **“Get Verification Code”**:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/1166c8cf53a04b969a7fe4216ea9073e.png)

Retrieve the verification code from your email inbox and fill it in:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/8da09904934f4e93ada9193fd6ce5336.png)

### 3.5 Referral Code
If you have a referral code (provided by first-line personnel), enter it here:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/3cd62dee68494dd4b07fadf7ad2352f5.png)

---

## 4. Create Application

After successful registration, you will be redirected to the **Create Application** page.

If your application is used for **monitor**, select the following configuration:

![图片](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/c0ab1793d1af4e5a92bb2f2b13a0f004.png)

Click **“Submit”** and wait for backend review:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/895bb60971024e439481b492c43429fb.png)

---

## 5. Account Review & Login

Once your account is approved, you will receive a notification email:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/dd62c874f91f40e8884f6ff83d3f0900.png)
![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/e30e251ad2234c788f512738e93a2f81.png)

Log in using your registered email:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/fbaabacba559455895a0b7d3456e3913.png)

---

## 6. Application Information & AppKey

After logging in, open the **Dashboard** to view your application information:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/3271fa096dd44301977cc5f5d6244b71.png)

In the **Settings** page, you can find your **AppKey**:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/a48efe9f07854895ab75d4d6fe8d4af9.png)

---

## 7. Authentication & Access Token

Use the AppKey to authenticate and obtain an **accessToken**, which is required for all API requests:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/7e4550151ee349009b61c562ccd69cba.png)
![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/86421d637bed4fdf800228bb3ec6ada0.png)

You may use the provided **online debugging tool** to generate the token:

![image](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/15aacc08ccaa46d2a280da471f901170.png)

> **Note:** The accessToken is sensitive information. Keep it secure and avoid exposing it publicly.

---

## 8. API Access & Documentation

In the **API Management** section, you can view all APIs authorized for your application:

![图片](https://api-eu.sigencloud.com/s3bucketpath/4eee43863f9c4e589f9e8884c4a0fe92.png)

Click the icon on the right to open detailed API documentation.

---


For further assistance, please contact the platform technical support team.

---
